docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OROZ, AGUSTIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLUCHER, LARRY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: ROOM 6, MARCONI HOTEL, 554 BROADWAY, LEASE FORFEITED
